dateline: Hawthorne, CA / Boca Chica, TX — May 2002–Present
heroHeadline: Cygnus NG-24 Launched; Booster 19 on Pad for Historic 33-Engine Static Fire — IFT-12 Countdown Begins
heroSubtitle: 8,743 days of reusability milestones — 45 launches in 2026 (598 total recoveries); Cygnus NG-24 S.S. Steven R. Nagel launched April 11 with inaugural LZ-40 landing; Booster 19 on Pad 2 with 33 Raptor 3 engines ready for historic full-duration static fire; IFT-12 V3 Starship debut targets May 2026
footerNote: Data sourced from SpaceX.com, FAA, NASA, SpaceNews, NASASpaceflight.com, Spaceflight Now, CNBC, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, TIME, Space.com, Via Satellite, Northrop Grumman
